label: Capture habit
desc: What you reach for when something is worth keeping.

label: Pattern awareness
desc: What you notice across what you have gathered.

label: Organisation
desc: How easy it is to return to what you have captured.

label: Selection
desc: How you decide what deserves more of your attention.

label: Concept formation
desc: How you move from a vague thought to something specific.

label: Pressure testing
desc: How honestly you examine an idea before committing to it.

label: Purpose clarity
desc: How well you know what an idea is actually for.

label: Decision making
desc: How you choose which idea gets your time.

label: Translation into action
desc: How you move from concept to a first practical step.

label: Tool fluency
desc: How well your tools serve the thing you are making.

label: Completion and release
desc: How consistently you finish and share work.

label: Iteration
desc: How you build on what you have already made.
